title: 🔧 Fix backup-with-mission-control.sh errors
description:
## What
The backup automation script is hitting two errors on scheduled runs:

1. **Tar circular reference** — tar can't add archive to itself
2. **Mission Control build missing** — missing `_document.js` in next.js build

## Issues
- grand-ot (code 1): `Can't add archive to itself`
- crisp-ca (code 0): `ENOENT: /Users/openclaw/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/.next/server/pages/_document.js`

## Steps
1. Review `~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/backup-with-mission-control.sh`
2. Exclude backup destination from tar operations
3. Ensure Mission Control is built before backing up
4. Test backup run
5. Verify no errors on next scheduled execution

## Why
- Backups are failing silently with partial completion
- Affects system reliability and data protection
- Scheduled to run, needs fixing before next cycle

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Backup script runs without tar circular reference error
- [ ] Mission Control build completes successfully
- [ ] Full backup completes and stores without errors
- [ ] Scheduled backup runs pass without exit codes 1 or errors
